mapper.sql: id, comment_place_name, comment_time, comment_user, comment_type, comment_score, comment_source, create_time
mapper.insert:
insert into restaurant_comment_info
id,
comment_place_name,
comment_time,
comment_user,
comment_type,
comment_score,
comment_source,
create_time,
comment_content,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{commentPlaceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{commentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{commentUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{commentType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{commentScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{commentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{commentContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update restaurant_comment_info
comment_place_name = #{commentPlaceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
comment_time = #{commentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
comment_user = #{commentUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
comment_type = #{commentType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
comment_score = #{commentScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
comment_source = #{commentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
comment_content = #{commentContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update restaurant_comment_info set comment_place_name = #{commentPlaceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comment_time = #{commentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, comment_user = #{commentUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comment_type = #{commentType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, comment_score = #{commentScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, comment_source = #{commentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, comment_content = #{commentContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update restaurant_comment_info set comment_place_name = #{commentPlaceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comment_time = #{commentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, comment_user = #{commentUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comment_type = #{commentType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, comment_score = #{commentScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, comment_source = #{commentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into restaurant_comment_info (id, comment_place_name, comment_time, comment_user, comment_type, comment_score, comment_source, create_time, comment_content ) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.commentPlaceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.commentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.commentUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.commentType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.commentScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.commentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.commentContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )
on duplicate key update comment_type = values(comment_type), create_time = sysdate()

insert into restaurant_comment_info_putuo (id, comment_place_name, comment_time, comment_user, comment_type, comment_score, comment_source, create_time, comment_content ) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.commentPlaceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.commentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.commentUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.commentType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.commentScore,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{item.commentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.commentContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )
on duplicate key update comment_type = values(comment_type), create_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: SELECT pi.place_name FROM place_info pi LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(rci.id) as get_num,rci.comment_place_name,rci.comment_source from restaurant_comment_info rci GROUP BY rci.comment_place_name,rci.comment_source ) a ON pi.place_name = a.comment_place_name AND pi.place_source = a.comment_source WHERE pi.place_type = #{placeType} AND pi.place_source = #{placeSource} AND pi.comment_num > 0 AND a.get_num is NULL ORDER BY pi.comment_num desc
SELECT pi.place_name FROM place_info pi WHERE pi.key_word= #{keyWord} and pi.place_type = #{placeType} AND pi.place_source = #{placeSource}

select
from restaurant_comment_info order by comment_time desc limit 1
